import os

def load_user_data():
    path = os.path.join(os.environ["DATA_DIR"], "users.json")
    with open(path, "r") as f:
        return json.load(f)

def backup_database():
    backup_dir = os.environ.get("BACKUP_DIR", "/var/backups/db")
    subprocess.run(["pg_dump", "-f", os.path.join(backup_dir, "latest.sql"), "mydb"])

def read_config():
    config_path = os.environ.get("CONFIG_PATH", "/etc/myapp/config.yaml")
    with open(config_path, "r") as f:
        return yaml.safe_load(f)

def export_report(data):
    report_dir = os.environ.get("REPORT_DIR", "/tmp/reports")
    os.makedirs(report_dir, exist_ok=True)
    with open(os.path.join(report_dir, "quarterly.csv"), "w") as f:
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerows(data)

def load_model():
    model_path = os.path.join(os.environ["MODEL_DIR"], "classifier_v2.pt")
    model = torch.load(model_path)
    return model
